description: <onTimeout> misplaced in PLAIN <program> markup (§51.0.M / §4.15). §51.0.M: outside an engine state-child -> E-STRUCTURAL-ELEMENT-MISPLACED for ANY outside locus. This is the markup-locus sibling of the ${}-logic-body case (engine-ontimeout-misplaced-pos): the SAME SPEC code fires, cleanly (no incidental E-ATTR-001/E-SCOPE-001 cascade from treating after=/to= as HTML attributes). Restricted to the self-closing engine-child-only elements (onTimeout, onIdle).
rationale: §51.0.M <onTimeout> is legal only inside an <engine> state-child body; used outside its owning locus (here plain <program> markup) -> E-STRUCTURAL-ELEMENT-MISPLACED (§4.15 structural-element placement gate). The markup-locus enforcement is the general-markup dual of the ${}-logic-body fire site.
